hero.title: Master Vietnamese with Expert Native Teachers
hero.subtitle: haviTalk is a curated Vietnamese language center connecting you with passionate, experienced native teachers. Online or in-person in Seoul.

highlights.title: Why Learn With Us?
highlights.subtitle: We're not just any language school. Here's what makes haviTalk different.

native.title: 100% Native Teachers
native.description: Every teacher at haviTalk is a native Vietnamese speaker, bringing authentic pronunciation, cultural depth, and real-world fluency to your lessons.

proven.title: Proven Student Success
proven.description: With a 5-star average rating and hundreds of glowing reviews, our students consistently achieve their Vietnamese learning goals.

multilingual.title: Multilingual Instruction
multilingual.description: Our teachers speak English, Korean, and Japanese — so they can explain grammar, tones, and nuances in the language you're most comfortable with.

flexible.title: Learn on Your Schedule
flexible.description: Choose online lessons via Zoom or Google Meet, or join in-person sessions in Seoul. Flexible scheduling that fits your lifestyle.

teachers.title: Meet Our Teachers
teachers.subtitle: Handpicked Vietnamese educators who are passionate about helping you succeed.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Vietnamese Journey?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of students who have discovered the joy of learning Vietnamese with haviTalk. From complete beginner to advanced conversation — we have a lesson for you.
